title: Component Library Consolidation — One Canonical Library with Search and Migration Path
description: Consolidate from three overlapping frontend component libraries to one canonical library with a clear migration path and deprecation enforcement. Deliverables: designate the canonical library, build a component search interface (type a need, find the canonical solution with props, examples, and design token mapping), create migration tooling and a timeline for sunsetting the legacy libraries, and implement CI-tested Storybook so documentation cannot go stale. Eliminates 30-minute-per-feature archaeology and code review debates about library choice.
